# stalkerdice

> A browser-based dice roller for the STALKER board game.

## What it does

Simulates the two custom dice used in the **STALKER board game** (inspired by the *S.T.A.L.K.E.R.* video game series, set in the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone).

Players select how many green and yellow dice to roll, click **ROLL DICE**, and see the individual die faces plus totals for Stars (★) and Gas Masks (☠). A "mean per roll" strip shows the statistical expected values for the chosen pool.

Live app: <https://felixdombek.github.io/stalkerdice/>

## Source layout

```
index.html       – complete single-file app (HTML + CSS + JS, no build step)
README.md        – project readme
suggestions.md   – backlog of improvement ideas
.github/
  workflows/
    deploy.yml              – deploys main branch to gh-pages on push
    pr-preview.yml          – deploys PR preview pages to GitHub Pages
  copilot-instructions.md   – coding-agent instructions (Copilot, etc.)
llms.txt                    – this file
```

## Tech stack

- Plain HTML5 / CSS3 / JavaScript (ES6+)
- No framework, no build tool, no package manager
- Hosted on GitHub Pages (served from `gh-pages` branch, deployed automatically from `main`)

## Dice mechanics

### Green die (6 faces)

| Face | Stars | Weighted bonus |
|------|-------|----------------|
| ★★ (white-bordered) | 2 | +2 |
| ★★★ | 3 | 0 |
| ★★ | 2 | 0 |
| ★ | 1 | 0 |
| ★ | 1 | 0 |
| *(blank)* | 0 | 0 |

Mean per green die: **1.5 ★**, **0.333 weighted bonus**

### Yellow die (6 faces)

| Face | Stars | Gas Masks |
|------|-------|-----------|
| ☠☠ | 0 | 2 |
| ★☠ | 1 | 1 |
| ★☠ | 1 | 1 |
| ★★ | 2 | 0 |
| ☠ | 0 | 1 |
| ★ | 1 | 0 |

Mean per yellow die: **0.833 ★**, **0.833 ☠**
